import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Archive Application Variant"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/applications/variants/{application_variant_id}/archive"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Soft-delete a variant.

The variant and its revisions are hidden from queries unless
`include_archived: true` is sent. Revision IDs remain resolvable so
historical traces are preserved.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
